info.title: Knapcode.CatalogCrawler
info.description: A tool to operate on the NuGet catalog.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

commands.name: download
commands.description: Download NuGet catalog documents to a local directory.

options.name: service-index-url
options.description: The NuGet V3 service index URL.

options.name: data-dir
options.description: The directory for storing catalog documents.

options.name: depth
options.description: The depth of documents to download.

options.name: json-formatting
options.description: The setting to use for formatting downloaded JSON.

options.name: max-pages
options.description: The maximum number of pages to complete before terminating.

options.name: max-commits
options.description: The maximum number of commits to complete before terminating.

options.name: format-paths
options.description: Format paths to mitigate directories with many files.

options.name: parallel-downloads
options.description: The maximum number of parallel downloads.

options.name: verbose
options.description: Whether or not to write debug messages.

commands.name: update-reports
commands.description: Incrementally update reports built off of the NuGet catalog. Possible report names are: CatalogLeafCount, CatalogLeafCountByType, DeletedPackages

options.name: data-dir
options.description: The directory for storing cursors and reports.

options.name: max-pages
options.description: The maximum number of pages to complete before terminating.

options.name: max-commits
options.description: The maximum number of commits to complete before terminating.

options.name: default-cursor-value
options.description: The default value for a new cursor. [default: DateTimeOffset.MinValue]

options.name: verbose
options.description: Whether or not to write debug messages.
